**INTERNAL DEAL MEMO**  
Project Codename: Operation Emerald

Date: October 12, 2023

To: Ms. Siti Aishah binti Abdullah  
From: Dr. Edward Tan Wei Ming  
Subject: Unannounced Acquisition of Sapphire Innovations Pte. Ltd.

We are pleased to inform you that under Project Emerald, we are moving forward with the acquisition of Sapphire Innovations Pte. Ltd., UEN: 200312345Z, for a total consideration of SGD 25,000,000. This strategic acquisition is intended to enhance our technology portfolio and expand our market presence in Southeast Asia.

Please note that all communications should be conducted through secure channels. For any queries, contact Dr. Tan Wei Ming at +65 9123 4567 or via email at edward.tan@emeraldcorp.sg.

Additionally, ensure that all relevant documentation includes the NRIC of our legal advisor, Mr. Rajesh Kumar, S6543217Z, for verification purposes.

This acquisition remains confidential until the official announcement. Your compliance with our non-disclosure agreement is appreciated.

Best regards,  
Dr. Edward Tan Wei Ming  
Director of Strategic Development  
Emerald Corporation Ltd.
